Patch Set 4: Code-Review-1

(5 comments)

Except for the minor build error I think the patch looks reasonably good.  It would be nice to get a stripped-down version of this applied to b2_15 that just skips any large NIDs found in the config, so that old clients don't choke when connecting to servers that advertise both  small and large NIDs.

parents.subject: LU-10391 mgc: gracefully ignore unrecognised recovery logs

commit.subject: LU-13306 obdclass: support large nids in mgs_nidtbl_entry
commit.message:
LU-13306 obdclass: support large nids in mgs_nidtbl_entry

mgs_nidtbl_entry can now contain large nids and these will be handled
correctly.  There is not yet any mechansims for placing large nids in
the nidtbl entry.

The loop in mgc_apply_recover_logs() which reads these entries is
restructured.  The "swab" of the entry is split into two parts.  The
"header" is "swab"ed as soon as we know the entry is large enough
for that to make sense.  The content is swabbed later once the header
has been found to look sane.

Signed-off-by: Mr NeilBrown <neilb@suse.de>
Change-Id: I3ef505ab1439d06e6d324363948d5f15f99f3a31
